### Alert #4 & #10 — gRPC Auth Bypass (CVE-2026-33186)

```json

  "alert_number": [4, 10],

  "ecosystem": "go",

  "ghsa": "GHSA-p77j-4mvh-x3m3",
  "action": "CRITICAL_ACTION_REQUIRED",
  "severity": "CRITICAL (CVSS 9.1)",
  "reachability": {
    "status": "reachable",
    "evidence": "Imported in telemetry/collector/google_volume_metrics.go. Auth bypass via missing leading slash in :path — any gRPC server endpoint is affected.",
    "scope": "runtime"
  },
  "remediation": {
    "fix_available": true,
    "patched_version": "1.79.3",
    "breaking_risk": "low — patch-level fix expected",
    "manifests_affected": ["go.mod", "cicd/go.mod"]
  },
  "rationale": "Authorization bypass in gRPC. Attacker can skip auth checks by manipulating :path header. Critical severity, used in production telemetry/collection layer.",
  "data_gaps": ["exact_grpc_server_configuration_not_verified"]
}
```
